info.title: SQL-Databricks Bridge
info.description: Bidirectional SQL Server ↔ Databricks data sync service

get.description: Simple check that the service is running.

schema.title: Response Liveness Api V1 Health Live Get

get.description: Check that all dependencies are available.
Check that the service has started successfully.

schema.title: Response Startup Api V1 Health Startup Get

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's identity, roles, and authorized countries.
Returns the list of supported countries and their available SQL queries.
Returns the list of pipeline stages.
Queries on-premise SQL Server to check whether elegibilidad and pesaje data exist for the given period.

post.description: Start a data extraction job from SQL Server to Databricks.

get.description: Get the status of an extraction job.
List all extraction jobs.

schema.title: Response List Jobs Api V1 Jobs Get

post.description: Submit a new sync event for processing (Databricks → SQL Server).

parameters.name: process_immediately

schema.description: Process event immediately instead of queuing
schema.title: Process Immediately

parameters.description: Process event immediately instead of queuing

get.description: List sync events with optional filtering.

schema.title: Response List Sync Events Api V1 Sync Events Get

get.description: Get details of a specific sync event.

post.description: Retry a failed or blocked sync event.

get.description: Get statistics about sync events.

schema.title: Response Get Sync Stats Api V1 Sync Stats Get

get.description: Get the status of the background event poller.

schema.title: Response Get Poller Status Api V1 Sync Poller Status Get

post.description: Manually trigger a poll cycle to process pending events.

schema.title: Response Trigger Poll Cycle Api V1 Sync Poller Trigger Post

post.description: Tag a specific version of a Delta table. If version is null, tags the latest version.

get.description: List version tags with optional filtering by table name or tag.

delete.description: Delete a version tag for a specific table.

get.description: Get Delta table version history annotated with any existing tags.

post.description: Trigger a data extraction (SQL Server -> Databricks) for a country.

get.description: List extraction events with optional filtering and pagination.
Get detailed status of a specific extraction event.

post.description: Cancel a running sync or calibration job.

get.description: Generate and return a CSV report for a completed calibration job.

post.description: Create a new calibration pipeline run for a country.
Poll Databricks Jobs API for steps with attached run IDs and update status.

patch.description: Update the status of a specific pipeline step.
Update the status of a specific substep within a step.

post.description: Trigger an existing Databricks job by its numeric ID with optional parameters.

get.description: Get status, progress, and task details for a Databricks job run.
Root endpoint with service info.

CalibrationStepResponse.title: CalibrationStepResponse
CalibrationStepResponse.description: Calibration step as expected by the calibration frontend.

ComponentHealth.title: ComponentHealth
ComponentHealth.description: Health status for a single component.

sync_queries.title: Sync Queries
sync_queries.description: Queries for the sync step (null = use defaults)

version.title: Version
version.description: Delta table version to tag. null = latest version.

queries_path.title: Queries Path
queries_path.description: Path to directory containing SQL query files

config_path.title: Config Path
config_path.description: Path to directory containing YAML config files

destination.title: Destination
destination.description: Databricks volume path (used for staging only; tables written to catalog.schema)

target_catalog.title: Target Catalog
target_catalog.description: Override default Unity Catalog name for output tables

target_schema.title: Target Schema
target_schema.description: Override default schema name for output tables

ExtractionRequest.title: ExtractionRequest
ExtractionRequest.description: Request to start a data extraction job.

ExtractionResponse.title: ExtractionResponse
ExtractionResponse.description: Response when extraction job is started.

QueryResult.title: QueryResult
QueryResult.description: Result of a single query execution.

parameters.title: Parameters
parameters.description: Job parameters (key-value pairs passed to job_parameters).

StepStatus.title: StepStatus
StepStatus.description: Status of a pipeline step or substep.

country.title: Country
country.description: Country code for SQL Server connection

SyncEvent.title: SyncEvent
SyncEvent.description: Event for Databricks to SQL sync.

period.title: Period
period.description: Period code (e.g. '202602'). Stored with the job for filtering.

queries.title: Queries
queries.description: Specific queries to run. null = all queries for the country.

row_limit.title: Row Limit
row_limit.description: Override row limit per query (TOP N). null = use server default.

lookback_months.title: Lookback Months
lookback_months.description: Override rolling lookback months. null = use server default.

skip_sync.title: Skip Sync
skip_sync.description: Skip the sync_data step (SQL Server extraction). Use when data is already synced.
